factFamilies.evidence: definitions emit graph nodes and file DEFINES edges for provider-backed files
in-repo import targets emit IMPORTS and import-use USES edges; external imports remain unresolved evidence
resolved callable targets emit CALLS edges; unresolved/external calls remain metrics/evidence
resolved member/property accesses emit ACCESSES edges; unresolved accesses remain metrics/evidence
resolved type annotations and bindings emit USES edges; built-in/external types remain unresolved or intentionally ignored
owner/member definitions emit HAS_METHOD, HAS_PROPERTY, and MEMBER_OF-style graph relationships where supported
class extends facts resolve to EXTENDS plus compatibility INHERITS when in-repo targets are found
route/tool/process edges are framework/analyzer-derived and covered outside provider parity fixtures

factFamilies.evidence: COBOL PROGRAM-ID nodes and nesting relationships are emitted by internal/cobol
COBOL sections, paragraphs, PERFORM, and CALL metrics are emitted by internal/cobol
COPY statements are tracked by dedicated COBOL metrics and copybook expansion tests
JCL job/step program links are tracked by dedicated COBOL metrics and JCL tests
COBOL is scanned and processed by the dedicated analyzer phase; it is not routed through ScopeIR provider extraction

graphCoverage.providerParityProofLevel: dedicated analyzer metrics, not ScopeIR provider parity
